name: 15_Image_Captioning_ShowAndTell_Flickr8k_DL
query: Huu ni mradi wangu wa sasa wa PyTorch: Kuendeleza mfumo wa kutengeneza maelezo ya picha kiotomatiki kwa kutumia mfano wa Show and Tell. Hapa nimepata repo inayoweza kukuongoza: https://github.com/sgrvinod/a-PyTorch-Tutorial-to-Image-Captioning. Tumia seti ya data ya Flickr8k, ukiipakua kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://huggingface.co/datasets/jxie/flickr8k) na kuipakia katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfumo unapaswa kutengeneza maelezo ya picha za sampuli na kuyaokoa katika `results/metrics/generated_descriptions.txt`. Mfumo wa umakini lazima utekelezwe katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi mfano uliopangwa awali kama `models/saved_models/show_and_tell_model.pt`. Onyesha uzito wa umakini na uhifadhi katika `results/figures/attention_weights.png`. Seti ya data inapaswa kupakia vizuri, na kushughulikia makosa ipasavyo ikiwa kuna matatizo yoyote. Kwa hali bora, mfumo wa umakini unapaswa kuonyesha wazi maeneo ya picha ambayo yana ushawishi mkubwa katika kutengeneza maelezo.

requirements.criteria: Mfano wa "Show and Tell" uliopangwa awali unatumika.
Seti ya data ya "Flickr8k", inayoweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://huggingface.co/datasets/jxie/flickr8k), inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Maelezo yaliyotengenezwa ya picha za sampuli yanaokolewa katika `results/metrics/generated_descriptions.txt`.
Onyesho la uzito wa umakini linaokolewa kama `results/figures/attention_weights.png`.

preferences.criteria: Seti ya data inapaswa kupakia vizuri, na kushughulikia makosa kwa uwazi ikiwa kuna matatizo yoyote wakati wa kupakua.
Mfumo wa umakini unapaswa kuonyesha wazi maeneo ya picha ambayo yanachangia zaidi katika maelezo yaliyotengenezwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "Show and Tell" uliopangwa awali unatumika.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file contains only a placeholder implementation with no actual "Show and Tell" model architecture. The `build_model()` function returns a simple string placeholder ("model placeholder") rather than implementing the actual Show and Tell neural network (CNN encoder + RNN/LSTM decoder). There is no encoder (e.g., ResNet/VGG), no LSTM decoder, no embedding layers, and no actual model training or inference logic. Similarly, `data_loader.py` is a stub that returns a hardcoded dictionary instead of actually loading the Flickr8k dataset. The trajectory evidence also confirms no steps related to implementing or running the Show and Tell model were recorded.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Flickr8k", inayoweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://huggingface.co/datasets/jxie/flickr8k), inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the Flickr8k dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real dataset loading logic. There is no code that connects to HuggingFace (`jxie/flickr8k`), no use of `datasets` library or any download mechanism, and no actual processing of Flickr8k images or captions. The file merely lists the requirement as a string constant (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`) rather than implementing it.

<UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/model.py` does not implement any attention mechanism. The file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with a `build_model()` function that returns a string, a list of `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` strings, and no actual neural network code. There is no attention layer, attention class, or any attention-related computation implemented in the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Maelezo yaliyotengenezwa ya picha za sampuli yanaokolewa katika `results/metrics/generated_descriptions.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/generated_descriptions.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of actual generated image descriptions. This indicates that the image captioning process was not properly executed or the results were not saved correctly. The trajectory evidence also confirms that there is no evidence of the image description generation process being executed or the results being saved to this file.

<SATISFIED>: The file `models/saved_models/show_and_tell_model.pt` exists in the project structure as shown in the workspace tree. Although the trajectory evidence does not confirm the saving process directly, the file's presence in the correct path (`models\saved_models\show_and_tell_model.pt`) satisfies the requirement that the trained model is saved at the specified location.

judge_stats.criteria: Onyesho la uzito wa umakini linaokolewa kama `results/figures/attention_weights.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/attention_weights.png` exists in the project structure, but its content cannot be verified as a valid attention weights visualization. The file reading attempt returned an error (`litellm.BadRequestError`) indicating a media type mismatch issue during reading, meaning the actual image content could not be confirmed. There is no evidence from the trajectory or code execution that a proper attention weights plot was successfully generated and saved. The file's presence alone is insufficient to confirm it contains a valid attention weights visualization.
